form.title: Supply of three industrial generators
form.description: Purchase and delivery of three 45KVA generators to the Lagos warehouse.
form.releaseConditions: Release after all three generators are delivered, inspected, and tested successfully.

form.title: Wedding catering and venue setup
form.description: Catering and table setup for 180 guests.
form.releaseConditions: Release after catering service and venue setup are completed as agreed.

form.title: Interstate haulage for packaged foods
form.description: Dedicated truck delivery from Lagos to three distribution points in Abuja and Kaduna.
form.releaseConditions: Release after signed waybills and delivery confirmations are received from all three locations.

form.title: Monthly Lagos last-mile deliveries
form.description: Monthly shared-load and last-mile delivery service for twelve GreenBasket retail locations.
form.releaseConditions: Release monthly after delivery scans and signed store receipts are uploaded for all locations.
